mapper.select: SELECT e.emp_id AS empId, e.emp_name AS empName, e.emp_pw AS empPw, e.emp_tel AS empTel, e.emp_email AS empEmail, e.emp_deptno AS empDeptno, d.dname AS deptName, e.emp_auth AS empAuth, e.emp_first AS empFirst, e.emp_inoffice AS empInOffice, e.emp_hiredate AS empHiredate FROM emp e LEFT JOIN dept d ON e.emp_deptno = d.deptno WHERE e.emp_id = #{empId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp ( emp_id, emp_name, emp_pw, emp_tel, emp_email, emp_deptno, emp_auth, emp_first, emp_inoffice, emp_hiredate ) VALUES ( 'EMP' || EMP_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{empName}, '1234', #{empTel}, #{empEmail}, #{empDeptno}, #{empAuth}, 'Y', #{empInOffice}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE emp SET emp_name = #{empName}, emp_tel = #{empTel}, emp_email = #{empEmail}, emp_deptno = #{empDeptno}, emp_auth = #{empAuth}, emp_inoffice = #{empInOffice} WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
mapper.select: SELECT d.deptno AS empDeptno, d.dname AS deptName, COUNT(e.emp_id) AS deptCount FROM dept d LEFT JOIN emp e ON e.emp_deptno = d.deptno AND e.emp_inoffice != 99 GROUP BY d.deptno, d.dname ORDER BY d.deptno
